/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/core/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/core/GameLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/core/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/ecs/Component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/ecs/EntityManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/ecs/System.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/AssetManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/AudioSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/InputSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/camera/Camera2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/input/InputSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/input/SfmlInputAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/rendering/SfmlRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/engine/window/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/gameplay/Building.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/gameplay/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/gameplay/SelectionController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/gameplay/Unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/gameplay/Weapon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/scripting/ScriptEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/ui/UISystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/world/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/world/TileMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/world/TileMapRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RedClone.dir/src/world/World.cpp.o -o RedClone  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -lrt /usr/lib64/libXrandr.so /usr/lib64/libXcursor.so /usr/lib64/libXrender.so /usr/lib64/libXfixes.so /usr/lib64/libXi.so /usr/lib64/libXext.so /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libGL.so /usr/lib64/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib64/libfreetype.so /usr/lib64/libharfbuzz.so -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
